name: Gas exchange half-saturation surface area
tier_rationale: Tier C pending re-review. Source citation: mayhew-1986-gas-diffusion. Population: Human placentae across gestation. Caveats: Phenomenological model parameter mapping morphometric diffusing capacity onto a saturable equilibrator. Validate against UV PO2 endpoint.
notes: Villous surface area at which placental gas-equilibration efficiency reaches half of its asymptote. Caveats: Phenomenological model parameter mapping morphometric diffusing capacity onto a saturable equilibrator. Validate against UV PO2 endpoint.

name: Maximum venous-equilibrator fraction
tier_rationale: Tier C pending re-review. Source citation: carter-pijnenborg-2011-gas-exchange. Population: Healthy term human placentae. Caveats: Saturation cap derived to reproduce the textbook 25-40 mmHg UV PO2 window at term.
notes: Asymptotic upper bound on placental gas-equilibration efficiency as villous area increases. Caveats: Saturation cap derived to reproduce the textbook 25-40 mmHg UV PO2 window at term.
